properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Empty hands held high Such small sacrifice Now joined with my life I sing in vain tonight May the words I say And the things I do Make my lifesong sing Bring a smile to you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let my lifesong sing to you Let my lifesong sing to you I want to sign your name To the end of this day Lord led my heart was true Let my lifesong sing to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I give my life A living sacrifice To reach a world in need To be your hands and feet So may the words I say And the things I do Make my lifesong sing Bring a smile to you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah let my lifesong sing to you Hallelujah, Hallelujah let my lifesong sing to you Hallelujah, Hallelujah let my lifesong sing to you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let my lifesong sing to you Let my lifesong sing to you I want to sign your name To the end of this day Lord led my heart was true Let my lifesong sing to you
